profile.successLogoutDescription: We'll be glad to see you again.

signup.heading: Join Vendee Today
signup.usernameDescription: It should be 3–20 characters long, unique, start with a letter and contain only letters, numbers, or underscores.
signup.emailDescription: We will use it to verify your account and help you recover access if needed.
signup.passwordDescription: Create a secure password with at least 8 characters. Use a mix of letters, numbers and symbols for better protection.
signup.successAlertDescription: A registration confirmation email has been sent to your email address. If you don't see the email, check your spam folder.

verify.heading: Account verification at Vendee
verify.errorDescription: Verification token is invalid or expired.

login.heading: Log in to Vendee
login.backButtonLabel: Don't have an account? Sign up
login.pinDescription: Enter the code from your authenticator app.
login.successDescription: Welcome and enjoy watching our streams.

resetPassword.heading: Password reset
resetPassword.emailDescription: The email address used during registration.
resetPassword.successAlertDescription: A password reset link has been sent to your email address. If you have Telegram notifications enabled, the link has also been sent there.

newPassword.heading: Setting a new password
newPassword.passwordConfirmDescription: Repeat your new password to confirm it.
newPassword.successDescription: You can now log in using your new password.
newPassword.errorMessage: Failed to set a new password!

deactivation.heading: Account deactivation
deactivation.emailDescription: The email address you used during registration
deactivation.passwordDescription: The password you created during registration
deactivation.pinDescription: A verification code has been sent to your email address. If you have Telegram notifications enabled, the code has also been sent there.
deactivation.errorMessage: An error occurred while deactivating your account

header.heading: Settings
header.description: Here you can manage your settings

header.heading: Profile
header.description: Customize your profile, update your avatar, change your personal information, and add social media links to make your page more attractive to other users.

avatar.heading: Profile picture

confirmModal.heading: Delete avatar
confirmModal.message: Are you sure you want to delete your profile picture? This action cannot be undone.

avatar.info: Supported formats: JPG, JPEG, PNG, WEBP, and GIF. Maximum file size: 10 MB.
avatar.errorUpdateMessage: An error occurred while updating the avatar
avatar.errorRemoveMessage: An error occurred while deleting the avatar

info.heading: Profile settings
info.usernameDescription: This is the name other users will know you by
info.displayNameDescription: Use capitalization in your display name however you prefer
info.bioPlaceholder: I love programming, playing PUBG, and CS2...
info.bioDescription: Your bio should not exceed 300 characters
info.errorMessage: An error occurred while updating the profile

addForm.heading: Social links
addForm.titleDescription: The text displayed for the link
addForm.urlDescription: The URL of your social media profile. Enter the full URL, for example: https://github.com/bagdenius
addForm.errorMessage: An error occurred while adding the link

editForm.errorUpdateMessage: An error occurred while updating the link
editForm.errorRemoveMessage: An error occurred while deleting the link

socialLinks.errorReorderMessage: An error occurred while updating the link order

header.heading: Account
header.description: Manage your account settings, including access, security, and account deactivation.
header.securityDescription: Enable two-factor authentication to better protect your account and personal data.
header.deactivationDescription: If you want to temporarily or permanently disable your account, use this option. Please be aware of the consequences.

email.heading: Email address
email.emailDescription: Enter your new email address. Make sure it is active, as a confirmation email will be sent to it.
email.errorMessage: An error occurred while updating your email address

password.heading: Account password
password.currentPasswordDescription: Enter your current password to verify your identity before changing it. This helps keep your account secure.
password.newPasswordDescription: Your new password must be at least 8 characters long. For better security, we also recommend using special characters.
password.errorMessage: An error occurred while updating your password

twofactor.heading: TOTP authentication
twofactor.description: Improve your account security by enabling TOTP authentication. This additional layer of protection requires a unique verification code from your authenticator app, making unauthorized access much more difficult.

enable.heading: Enable TOTP
enable.qrInstructions: Scan the QR code to add TOTP verification
enable.pinDescription: Please enter the 6-digit code generated by your authenticator app.

disable.heading: Are you sure you want to disable TOTP?
disable.message: Disabling TOTP authentication will make your account less secure. Are you sure you want to continue?

deactivation.heading: Account deactivation
deactivation.description: After deactivating your account, you will no longer be able to sign in. Your account will be permanently deleted after 7 days. Until then, you can contact support to restore access and reactivate your account.

confirmModal.heading: Confirm account deactivation
confirmModal.message: Are you sure you want to deactivate your account? You can restore access only within the next 7 days.
